sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id UInt64, my_map Map(String, UInt64)) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_map SET my_map = mapPartialReverseSort((k, v) -> v, 2, my_map) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, mapPartialReverseSort((k, v) -> v, 2, my_map) AS sorted_map FROM test_map;
SELECT my_map['k1'], my_map['k2'] FROM test_map WHERE id = 1;
